concerns: Args source in tool.execute.before is output.args (not input.args) — matches subagentQuestionBlockerHook pattern
Key-order normalization required for args hashing — use sortedStringify, not raw JSON.stringify
CircuitBreakerConfig has no array fields — simple spread merge is sufficient, no dedicated merge function needed
workflowRecommendation: Quick feature — standard pipeline, single implementer, 2 tasks (1 independent + 1 sequential)
